error_signature: downloads fail with errors after a long wait
title: HTTP Node fails to download large binary files
symptom: When attempting to download large binary files (200-500MB) using the HTTP node, the downloads fail after a long wait, causing workflow interruptions.
applies_when: Using HTTP node to download large binary files
n8n running on a VPS with limited resources
not_this_if: Using external storage like AWS S3
root_cause: n8n by default stores binary data in memory, which can lead to crashes or performance issues when handling large files. This is exacerbated on systems with limited RAM, causing downloads to fail.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE=filesystem to store binary data on disk.
Optionally, specify the storage path with N8N_BINARY_DATA_STORAGE_PATH if needed.
Restart n8n to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE to filesystem and restart n8n.
